headline: Avient Launches PREPERM Low Loss Dielectric Thermoplastics Globally
summary: AVNT's PREPERM Low Loss Dielectric Thermoplastics targets 5G/6G radar growth, helping address signal loss, warpage and BSIS barriers.

raw.headline: Avient Launches PREPERM Low Loss Dielectric Thermoplastics Globally

headline: KWR Enhances China Operations With New Facility at Zhangjiagang
summary: Quaker Chemical opens a new China manufacturing facility and expands its lab to boost local production, innovation and customer support across Asia-Pacific.
